title: The Timekeeper's Question
description: The Priest of Chronos has watched your journey with interest. He now asks the question that will define your path: Will you dedicate yourself fully to the service of Chronos, God of Time? To become a Devotee is to see the world through the lens of fate, inevitability, and the endless turning of the hourglass. Choose carefully - time flows in only one direction.

objectives.description: Complete the meditation ritual at the Temple altar
Accept or decline the path of Devotion to Chronos

notes: DESIGN INTENT: THE CRITICAL SOFT-LOCK QUEST. This is where the player commits to the Chronos path or declines. Accepting sets the 'chronos_devotee' flag which unlocks quests 6-10+. Declining ends the quest chain but doesn't lock out temple worship or other god quests. The dialogue should make it clear this is a significant choice. The Chronos Amulet is a unique equipment piece with +Intuition and minor time-related effects. Massive reputation gain (50) for accepting devotion. Other temple priests will acknowledge the player as 'Acolyte of Time' if they accept.
